database.title: 📅 Marketing Content Calendar
database.note: Single source-of-truth for every piece of marketing content across all 7 platforms. One row = one post/broadcast at any stage from idea to published.

fields.name: Post Title
fields.note: Short internal label, not the caption itself

fields.name: Design Brief
fields.note: Subject, format/size, key message — input to Canva generate-design

database.status_flow: Idea -> Draft -> Needs Design -> Ready for Review -> Approved -> Scheduled -> Published (or -> Rejected at any point before Approved)
views_recommended: This Week (calendar view filtered on Scheduled Date)
Needs My Review (filtered Status = Ready for Review)

related_existing_notion.email_campaign_engine_databases: separate system — B2B cold outreach, not this calendar
related_existing_notion.whatsapp_architecture_hub: 38cd108dee5c81daba27fb24fdea0777 — 1:1 service bot docs, not this Channel-broadcast use case
